---
title: "Analyse_Releves_PP"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-29"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Import librairies
```{r}
#importation tidyverse

library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(forcats)
library(lubridate)

library(ggsignif)


```

## Import données

```{r}
Tidy_Releves_PP <- read_csv("Data/Tidy_Releves_PP.csv")
View(Tidy_Releves_PP)
```

## 1ère Visualisation

```{r}

modele <- lm(Tidy_Releves_PP$DetectionLynx~Tidy_Releves_PP$TypePiege)
summary(modele)

ggplot(Releves_PP, aes(x = TypePiege, y = DetectionLynx)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", width = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE, fill = "grey", colour="black") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    x     = "Type de piège",
    y     = "Probabilité d'obtention de poils de lynx",
    title = "Comparaison des types de pièges à poils"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```
```{r}
modele <- lm(Tidy_Releves_PP$DetectionLynx~Tidy_Releves_PP$Support)
summary(modele)


ggplot(Releves_PP, aes(x = Support, y = DetectionLynx)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", width = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE, fill = "grey", colour="black") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    x     = "Type de support",
    y     = "Probabilité d'obtention de poils de lynx",
    title = "Comparaisons des types de support de pièges à poil"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```
